intro: Guide laser beams through clever puzzles in this relaxing yet challenging brain teaser.
description:
Enter a futuristic world of light and logic in this immersive 3D puzzle adventure. Your mission is simple: guide powerful laser beams through intricate environments by rotating mirrors, redirecting energy, activating switches, and solving increasingly complex challenges. Every level introduces new mechanics and obstacles that test your precision, timing, and problem-solving skills.

Explore beautifully designed stages filled with glowing visuals, dynamic lighting effects, and satisfying chain reactions as you discover the perfect path for each beam. From relaxing early puzzles to mind-bending late-game challenges, the experience is designed to be accessible for newcomers while offering rewarding depth for puzzle fans.

With intuitive controls, smooth gameplay, and dozens of unique laser-based challenges, this game delivers a relaxing yet engaging experience perfect for players who enjoy strategy, logic, and creative thinking. Can you master the light and complete every puzzle?
